feed.title: UnixBSDShell
feed.subtitle: A Blog That Focuses On UNIX Systems, Such As FreeBSD OpenBSD NetBSD and Others

entry.title: Install NPM Node.Js on OpenBSD
entry.summary: Node.js has the unique ability to turn the complex into something achievable.

entry.title: Базовая установка и настройка Apache Tomcat на сервере FreeBSD

link.title: Базовая установка и настройка Apache Tomcat на сервере FreeBSD

entry.summary: Apache и Apache Tomcat — два известных сервера веб-приложений, используемых во всем мире. Apache — это бесплатный веб-сервер с открытым исходным кодом, который позволяет пользователям размещать и обрабатывать динамические веб-сайты.

entry.title: How to Download Torrent Files with I2PSnark on OpenBSD

link.title: How to Download Torrent Files with I2PSnark on OpenBSD

entry.summary: BitTorrent is the most common protocol for exchanging files peer-to-peer, that is, directly between users without relying on a central server.

entry.title: How to Install Bitcoin BTC on OpenBSD Server

link.title: How to Install Bitcoin BTC on OpenBSD Server

entry.summary: Bitcoind is a program that implements the Bitcoin protocol for use with remote procedure calls (RPC Server)

entry.title: Implementing Maven and Java on FreeBSD 14.1

link.title: Implementing Maven and Java on FreeBSD 14.1

entry.summary: We present this tutorial for FreeBSD users so they can get to know Maven better, so that people can understand that Maven can be run on FreeBSD.

entry.title: Installing Python Package Manager PIP on OpenBSD 7.6

link.title: Installing Python Package Manager PIP on OpenBSD 7.6

entry.summary: Pip is a package management system used to install and manage software packages written in Python.

entry.title: How to Install i2pd on OpenBSD - Client For Anonymous I2P Network

link.title: How to Install i2pd on OpenBSD - Client For Anonymous I2P Network

entry.summary: I2pd or i2p daemon is a C++ based open source i2p client. It is an anonymous network layer where communication is encrypted and user IP addresses are not disclosed.

entry.title: How to Install i2p routing protocol on OpenBSD 7.6

link.title: How to Install i2p routing protocol on OpenBSD 7.6

entry.summary: If you want to install I2P on an OpenBSD system, you must install dependencies for I2P to run properly.

entry.title: How to Install Apache ZooKeeper on FreeBSD 14

link.title: How to Install Apache ZooKeeper on FreeBSD 14

entry.summary: Apache ZooKeeper aims for configuration management, distributed system synchronization, and clustering and naming

entry.title: Installing and Configuring Java OpenJDK 20 on FreeBSD 14.1 Stable

link.title: Installing and Configuring Java OpenJDK 20 on FreeBSD 14.1 Stable

entry.summary: OpenJDK is an open source implementation of Java Standard Edition (Java SE) and the Java Development Kit (JDK).
